title: Dunedin, OTA — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Dunedin, OTA: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Dunedin is a city in OTA with a population of 135,000. A historic South Island city with Scottish heritage, a renowned university, and the stunning Otago Peninsula wildlife.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
